name: Chinese Pepper Steak #3
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Round Steak, cut into thin strips
2 Green peppers, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute steak in oil until brown.
2. Add onions, garlic, green peppers, celery, pepper, consomme, cornstarch mixture (made with water and soy sauce), and cook everything together.
3. Simmer the mixture for 30 minutes.
4. Stir until thickened.
5. Serve with rice or pasta.
